focus: Traceability cross-check of spec requirements, task/checklist claims, implementation evidence, and resource-map coverage

findingDetails.title: Completion status is claimed while mandatory memory-save and checklist/task evidence remain pending
findingDetails.evidence: implementation-summary.md claims COMPLETE and all P0/P1 requirements met while spec.md REQ-015 requires /memory:save, implementation-summary.md marks REQ-015 PENDING, tasks.md leaves T-041 unchecked, and checklist.md leaves CHK-055 plus the verification summary unchecked.
findingDetails.recommendation: Downgrade the completion claim until /memory:save is executed and T-041/CHK-055 are checked with evidence, or document a user-approved deferral and remove the blanket all-P0/P1-met statement.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Cross-document packet evidence ties the same REQ-015 requirement through spec.md, implementation-summary.md, tasks.md, and checklist.md; no broader source scan is required for this traceability gate mismatch.

noveltyJustification: One new P1 traceability finding in a previously unreviewed dimension; prior resource-map P1 was carried forward but not counted as new.
edgeCases: completion_pct may mean implementation-only progress, but release wording says all P0/P1 requirements are met while REQ-015 is pending
findings registry is stale/empty relative to JSONL prior findings, so state log and dispatcher summary were used for continuity
resource-map P1-001 carried forward rather than duplicated
integrationEvidence: .gemini/commands/improve/ exact glob returned README.txt and improve-agent.toml only
resource-map runtime rows compared against implementation-summary N/A claims
